investigation_summary: Clean card: 2022 transfer to Patagonia Purpose Trust + Holdfast Collective — profits to climate fight. 1% for the Planet cofounder; Worn Wear repairs; Fair Trade sewn product; Bluesign fabrics; supplier list public; Good On You Great. Caveats: premium pricing; synthetics/microplastics; ~$700M capital-gains tax benefit on transfer (acknowledged by Chouinard).

profile.parent: Patagonia Purpose Trust / Holdfast Collective nonprofits
profile.tax_summary: 2022 restructuring — charitable + trust ownership; Chouinard cited tax mechanics transparently.
profile.legal_summary: Environmental litigation donations (e.g., Bears Ears) per company history.
profile.labor_summary: FLA-aligned fair compensation claims; union-free but above-sweatshop bar in audits cited by NGOs.
profile.environmental_summary: Climate activism core brand; materials programs; repair-first culture.
profile.product_health: Outdoor performance gear — chemical management via Bluesign on many lines.
profile.executive_summary: Chouinard founder; leadership transition post-trust transfer.
